opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain under my right ribs started after dinner last night and it hasn't stopped; now I'm shivering and can't keep water down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Unrelenting right upper abdominal pain with fever and vomiting since last night.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 10 hours ago, after a heavy dinner
symptom_narrative.duration: 10 hours and continuous, unlike her usual gallstone pain which settles within an hour or two
symptom_narrative.character: severe, constant pain under the right ribs
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: much worse and longer-lasting than her usual gallstone attacks
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right upper abdomen, radiating to the right shoulder blade
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe nausea, repeated vomiting of bile-coloured fluid, complete loss of appetite, shivering/chills, feeling generally unwell and hot
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: known history of gallstones with previous episodes of pain after fatty meals that always settled within 1-2 hours; this episode is different in that it hasn't stopped
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, moving very cautiously, guarding her right side

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took one dose overnight but vomited it back up immediately

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: sibling present and supportive, has a car available to help with transport

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants relief from the vomiting and pain, worried this might be more serious than her usual gallstone pain

access_barriers.transport: sibling available to drive to the emergency department
